name: The Hidden Archway
description: This 17th-century archway was once the main entrance to the city's artisan quarter.
facts: Look closely at the left pillar; you can still see the markings left by stone masons from 300 years ago.

name: Kaffee & Kunst
description: The best espresso in the neighborhood. The owner, Marco, roasts the beans in the back every Tuesday.
facts: The building was originally a pharmacy in the 1920s—notice the original apothecary drawers behind the counter.
